answers: After a workout, eat a meal with protein and carbs within 1-2 hours. Good options include chicken with rice, eggs with toast, a protein shake with banana, or Greek yogurt with fruit.
Post-workout recovery involves proper nutrition, hydration, stretching, and rest. Aim for 20-40g protein and some carbohydrates. Sleep is also crucial for muscle repair and growth.
Workout er por protein ar carbs khawa dorkar muscle recovery er jonno. Dim toast, chicken rice, protein shake banana diye, ba doodh kola mix holo valo options. Pani o onek khete hobe.

A simple post-workout shake can be whey protein with a banana and milk blended together. The protein helps muscle repair while carbs replenish glycogen stores. Don't forget to stretch and hydrate well after your session.
